__doc: How each block/view connects to its section. Defines what props the section must provide, what state it owns, and what interactivity layer it adds.

dumb-block.desc: Props in, JSX out. No hooks, no state, no data imports.

dumb-view.desc: Renders data layout. Accepts wrapper props for interactivity injection. No hooks, no state.

smart-section.desc: Owns state, reads store, wires callbacks, composes blocks/views. Only layer that imports data or uses hooks.

props.cards: { label: string; value: string | number; error?: boolean }[]

StatCards.section_provides: Compute from tasks: total, in_progress count, done count, overdue count

props.charts: { title: string; rows: { label: string; count: number; color: string }[]; total: number }[]

ChartCards.section_provides: Group tasks by priority/status, compute counts, pass BAR_COLORS/PRIORITY_BAR_COLORS

ControlsBar.section_provides: View state (useState or URL param via nuqs), filter/search handlers
ControlsBar.interactivity: Segment tabs toggle view mode. Filter buttons trigger dropdowns (future). Search filters data.

RecentTasks.section_provides: Sort tasks by due date, slice top 5, build column render functions using AvatarCell/BadgeCell/StatusDotCell/DateCell

KanbanCard.section_provides: Resolve member from task.assignee, format due date, compute overdue, map priority color

CreateTaskModal.section_provides: Modal open state, field config from MODAL_CONFIGS, submit handler dispatches ADD_TASK to store

TaskDetailsModal.section_provides: Selected task from store, resolve member, format dates, filter activity by task_id, build info rows with badges/avatars
TaskDetailsModal.interactivity: Mark complete dispatches MOVE_TASK to done. Edit opens CreateTaskModal in edit mode (future).

SettingsProfile.section_provides: User data from CURRENT_USER, field config from data.yaml settings, tab state

KanbanView.section_provides: DndContext wrapping, DroppableColumn as columnWrapper, DraggableCard as cardWrapper, DragOverlay, onMove handler dispatches MOVE_TASK
KanbanView.dnd_pattern: Section defines DroppableColumn + DraggableCard, passes as wrapper props. View renders layout. Section owns DndContext + DragOverlay + state.

TableView.section_provides: Filtered/sorted/paged data, column definitions with render functions
